notes: Converted from the Google API Discovery document for BigQuery v2, subset to the load path. The adaptor's load() wraps the @google-cloud/bigquery SDK, which under the hood creates a load job via jobs.insert with configuration.load (writeDisposition, createDisposition, skipLeadingRows, schemaUpdateOptions, schema). Included jobs.insert, jobs.get, tables.get and tabledata.insertAll with their core Discovery schema shapes (Job, Table, TableSchema, TableDataInsertAllResponse).
